title: Will Chad Bianco be elected Governor of California in 2026?

current.rationale_summary: Bianco polls ~13% (4th-5th) and likely fails to even advance past the top-two primary behind Hilton; California has not elected a Republican statewide since 2006. Joint ~1.5%.
key_drivers: Bianco ~13% trails Hilton for GOP slot
no CA statewide R win since 2006
